title: Decree-Law No. 36 of 2025 Amending the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Law
summary: Amends Bahrain’s AML and CFT framework and is relevant to virtual asset service providers because parliamentary and secondary reporting indicate the amended covered-activity schedule includes VASPs, although the VASP-specific schedule text was not fully verified from the opened official text.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Updates Bahrain’s AML and counter-terrorist financing law.
theme_notes.digital_finance.virtual_assets: Amends Bahrain AML and CFT framework relevant to virtual assets.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Decree-Law No. 4 of 2001 and interacts with CBB crypto-asset AML obligations
